ogTitle: Darling Downs vs Darradup: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Darling Downs and Darradup.
heading: Darling Downs vs Darradup — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Darling Downs, Western Australia and Darradup, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Darradup has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Darling Downs (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Darling Downs or Darradup safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Darling Downs has a flood risk score of 40/100, while Darradup scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Darling Downs scores 40/100 for bushfire risk. Darradup scores 41/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Darling Downs or Darradup?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Darradup has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.73% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
